title: Add negative compile-fail coverage for Meshtastic payload limit drift
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.3 adds a BUILD_ASSERT tying CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD to LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_TEXT_PAYLOAD_MAX in the gateway Meshtastic adapter, but current validation only covers successful matching builds. What needs to be done: add a no-hardware compile-fail/Twister fixture or equivalent CI check that intentionally sets CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD away from LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_TEXT_PAYLOAD_MAX for the Meshtastic gateway adapter test surface and asserts the build fails at the guard. Keep the positive native_sim gateway adapter build intact.
